'''''Nobu 2''''' was a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Cargo ferry]] which served in the [[Airam sector/Legends|Airam sector]] during the operations of [[Task Force Vengeance]].

When the decision was made to construct a shipyard in Airam space, ''Nobu 2'' and its sister-ships, ''[[Nobu 1]]'', ''[[Nobu 3]]'', and ''[[Nobu 4]]'', were joined with a Rebel convoy charged with bringing the needed supplies and personnel. ''Nobu 2'' itself bore construction equipment. Unfortunately for the Rebels, the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] had learned of them and readied a trap in the [[Rocrin system/Legends|Rocrin system]]. ''Nobu 2'' was destroyed with all the others.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter: Balance of Power Campaigns]]'' {{1st}}
